zh.lifeSummary: 當Watkin Vaughan II於1460年出生在英國賀福爾時，他的父親Watkin Vaughn I16歲，母親Sibyl Baskerville25歲。他與Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1518年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Watkin Vaughan II于1460年出生在英国賀福爾时，他的父亲Watkin Vaughn I16岁，母亲Sibyl Baskerville25岁。他与Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1518年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vaughan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

variants.name: Von
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Veon
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .

variants.name: Vaughns
meanings: Welsh: variant of Vaughan , with English patronymic -s.

nameMeanings.name: Watkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a revival of the medieval given name, a pet form of Walter (from Wat + the diminutive suffix -kin), or a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

en.lifeSummary: When Watkin Vaughan II was born in 1460, in Herefordshire, England, his father, Watkin Vaughn I, was 16 and his mother, Sibyl Baskerville, was 25. He married Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1518, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Watkin Vaughan II est né en 1460, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Watkin Vaughn I, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Baskerville, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1518, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Watkin Vaughan II 1460 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Watkin Vaughn I 16 und seine Mutter Sibyl Baskerville 25. Er hat Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1518 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Watkin Vaughan II è nato il nel 1460 nel Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Watkin Vaughn I, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl Baskerville, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1518, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Watkin Vaughan IIが1460年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Watkin Vaughn Iは16歳，母Sibyl Baskervilleは25歳であった。Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1518年にフランスピカーディソンメで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Watkin Vaughan II(이)가 1460년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Watkin Vaughn I(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl Baskerville(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1518년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Watkin Vaughan II nasceu em 1460, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Watkin Vaughn I, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Baskerville, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1518, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Watkin Vaughan II родился в 1460 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Watkin Vaughn I было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Baskerville, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1518 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Watkin Vaughan II nació en 1460, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Watkin Vaughn I, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Sibyl Baskerville, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1518, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
